Chinese: 氣象局已發出特別天氣信息
Portuguese: Foi emitido um aviso meteorológico especial.
English: The special weather advisory has been issued.

Chinese: 由於持續受低壓槽影響，預料本澳今日至明日初時 (27至28日)仍有驟雨及雷暴，雨勢有時頗大，明日稍後雨勢逐漸緩和；請市民留意天氣變化，並關注本局發出的提示及警告。(於 2026年06月27日07時05分 更新)
Portuguese: Devido à influência contínua de um vale depressionário, esperam-se aguaceiros fortes e trovoadas hoje (27), e Domingo (28). Prevê-se que os aguaceiros diminuam sucessivamente no Domingo. Aconselha-se à população que preste atenção às alterações meteorológicas e acompanhe os avisos e alertas emitidos pela DSMG.( Data de actualização: 2026-06-27 07H05 )
English: Due to the continuous influence of a trough of low pressure, showers and thunderstorms are expected from today to early hours tomorrow (27th to 28th June), which could be heavy at times. The rainfall is expected to gradually ease on later tomorrow. The public is advised to pay attention to weather changes and follow the alerts and warnings issued by SMG.( Update Time: 2026-06-27 07H05 )
